docket_entries.description: ORDER CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO MARCH 2, 2017 AT 3:30 (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF COALE, MEGAN AS TO ASSIGNEE OKUN, DIVINE
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,900.00 FILED BY COALE, MEGAN AS TO DEFENDANT OKUN, DIVINE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-08-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-02-2017 - JUDGMENT.
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $502.50 ACCRUED INTEREST, $25.00 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT OKUN, DIVINE
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 150.00 - SERVED NOV-05-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT OKUN, DIVINE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF COALE, MEGAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT OKUN, DIVINE $4,900.00 PRINCIPAL, $125.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,025.00, INCLUDED IN THE JUDGMENT ARE STATUTORY DAMAGES IN THE AMOUNT OF $2600.00 AWARDED DUE TO DEFENDANT'S FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH CIVIL CODE SECTION 1950.5 (L) IN BAD FAITH. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-08-2016 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO MAR-02-2017 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF MEGAN COALE. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
